description:
Legal record (#24) in a court register/pinqas from a beit din in Cairo (on f. 3v of T-S K22.27). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Undated, neighboring documents are circa 1693 CE. 

(Document #24) Incomplete entry involving some form of payment and/or a partnership. Only one name is preserved along the paper tear, Avraham Ḥanīn. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
